overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character carrying a large backpack traversing rugged mountainous terrain. The journey begins on dark volcanic rock paths, ascends through grassy slopes with coastal views, and transitions abruptly to a snowy alpine ridge with dramatic mountain peaks.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain valley path between cliff walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dark volcanic path between rocky cliff walls

entered.detail: tall gray rock wall forming the left boundary of the valley
black rocky trail surface with scattered stones
green grass growing on the right slope beside the path
massive rock formations on the right side of the valley

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow mountain valley on a dark volcanic path. Rocky cliff walls rise on the left while grass patches and large boulders line the right side. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character moves deeper into the terrain.

events.description: character begins ascending a steeper gravel slope, leaving the valley floor

agents.ego_description: climbing uphill over loose rocks and gravel, navigating the steep terrain

entered.detail: steep incline covered with loose gravel and small stones
rocks and boulders scattered across the slope

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a steep gravel slope, transitioning from the enclosed valley to more open mountainside terrain. The rocky cliff face moves closer on the left while the path becomes rougher and more challenging.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal mountain ridge with ocean overlook

events.description: ocean and distant coastline become visible as character reaches the ridge

agents.ego_description: walking along the mountain ridge with the ocean visible to the left, maintaining balance on the rocky path

entered.detail: vast blue ocean visible in the distance beyond the mountain slope
sandy beach and coastal area visible far below
narrow rocky trail along the edge of the mountain ridge

segments.scene_description: The character traverses an open mountain ridge with panoramic views of the ocean and distant coastline to the left. The terrain is rocky and exposed, with the path winding along the cliff edge. The lighting remains bright and natural as the character continues the ascent.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered alpine ridge with glacier views

events.description: abrupt transition from rocky terrain to snow-covered landscape with altered weather
lighting shifts to cooler, overcast tones as scene fades in from black

agents.ego_description: trudging through deep snow on the mountain ridge, heading toward higher peaks

entered.detail: white snow covering the ground and rocks, with footprints visible
tall mountain peak covered in snow and ice rising ahead
single leafless tree standing on the snowy slope
glowing blue holographic marker indicating a path or objective

segments.scene_description: Following a brief fade to black, the scene transitions to a stark snowy alpine environment. The character walks through deep snow toward a massive snow-capped peak, with a lone tree and a blue holographic marker visible on the right. The atmosphere is cold and overcast, with clouds visible below the ridge level.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey that transforms from a narrow volcanic valley into a stark, snowy alpine ridge. It begins with the camera trailing a character along a dark volcanic path enclosed by rocky cliff walls and scattered boulders. As the character ascends a steep gravel slope, the enclosed valley opens up into an exposed mountain ridge, revealing panoramic views of the ocean and a distant coastline under bright, natural light. The scene then shifts abruptly to a cold, overcast alpine environment where the character treks through deep snow toward a massive snow-capped peak. Finally, the camera moves past a lone tree and a blue holographic marker as clouds drift below the high ridge level.
